ddls:
CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the representative */,
  "political_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party the representative belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the representative */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_political_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("political_party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("political_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "political_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the party is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("political_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the political group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group (e.g., national, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party affiliation record */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "political_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "affiliation_start_date" TEXT /* Date the representative affiliated with the party */,
  "affiliation_end_date" TEXT /* Date the representative stopped being affiliated with the party, if applicable */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the affiliation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_political_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("political_party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("political_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_political_groups" (
  "national_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national political group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the national political group */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the national group is based */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the national group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("national_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_affiliations" (
  "group_affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group affiliation record */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political group the representative is affiliated with */,
  "affiliation_start_date" TEXT /* Date the representative affiliated with the group */,
  "affiliation_end_date" TEXT /* Date the representative stopped being affiliated with the group, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_affiliations_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_affiliations_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES political_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., approval rating) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the election is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., parliamentary, presidential) */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "political_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the party */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the election result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_political_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("political_party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("political_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the political issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., economic, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_issues" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between representative and issue */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political issue */,
  "position" TEXT /* The representative's position on the issue (e.g., for, against) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_issues_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES political_issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_issues_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media record */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the representative on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)
